title: Putting Proteomics Into Immunotherapy for Glioblastoma.
author: Chen L Qin D Guo X Wang Q Li J
content: S-EPMC7940695 PMC7940695 Putting Proteomics Into Immunotherapy for Glioblastoma. In glioblastoma, the most aggressive brain cancer, a complex microenvironment of heterogeneity and immunosuppression, are considerable hurdles to classify the subtypes and promote treatment progression.
